parameters.name: Alert Id
parameters.description: The alert id to track.

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workspace.

parameters.name: Scorecard id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the scorecard.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the goal.

parameters.name: Owner
parameters.description: The email address of the goal's owner. Example: foo@bar.com

parameters.name: Current value
parameters.description: The current value of the goal being tracked.

parameters.name: Target value
parameters.description: The target value of the goal.

parameters.name: Status
parameters.description: The current status the goal.

parameters.name: Start date
parameters.description: The start date for the goal. Example: 2021-07-15.

parameters.name: Completion date
parameters.description: The date for the goal to be completed by. Example: 2021-07-29.

parameters.name: Note
parameters.description: Note to attach to the initial check-in on goal creation. Can be multiline text

parameters.name: Parent goal id
parameters.description: If this goal is a subgoal, the unique id of its parent goal.

returns.raw:
| Name | Path | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Id | id | string | The unique identifier of the goal. |

parameters.description: Should null values be included in the results. Default is No.

InitiateExportToFileForPaginatedReports.displayName: Export To File for Paginated Reports

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workspace.

parameters.name: Report
parameters.description: The unique identifier of a paginated report.

parameters.name: Export Format
parameters.description: The export format for the paginated report. The supported formats are: PPTX (PowerPoint), PDF, ACCESSIBLEPDF (Accessible PDF), XLSX (Excel), DOCX (Word), CSV, XML, MHTML, and Image (BMP, EMF, GIF, JPEG, PNG, or TIFF).

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: The effective username reflected by a token for applying RLS rules (For OnPrem model, username can be composed of alpha-numerical characters or any of the following characters '.', '-', '_', '!', '#', '^', '~', '\', '@', also username cannot contain spaces. For Cloud model, username can be composed of all ASCII characters. username must be up to 256 characters)

parameters.name: Datasets
parameters.description: An array of datasets for which this identity applies

parameters.name: Roles
parameters.description: An array of RLS roles reflected by a token when applying RLS rules (identity can contain up to 50 roles, role can be composed of any character besides ',' and must be up to 50 characters)

parameters.name: CustomData
parameters.description: The value of customdata to be used for applying RLS rules. Only supported for live connections to Azure Analysis Services.

parameters.name: Blob Value
parameters.description: OAuth2 access token for SQL Azure

parameters.name: Reports
parameters.description: An array of reports for which this identity applies, Only supported for paginated reports

parameters.name: FormatSettings
parameters.description: Dictionary of format settings. The keys are the device info property names for the requested file format.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The report parameter name

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The report parameter value

returns.raw:
The content of the file.
- File Content
- binary

InitiateExportToFileForPbiReports.displayName: Export To File for Power BI Reports

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workspace.

parameters.name: Report
parameters.description: The unique identifier of a pbi report.

parameters.name: Export Format
parameters.description: The export format for the Power BI report. The supported formats are: PPTX (PowerPoint), PDF, and PNG

parameters.name: Locale
parameters.description: The locale to apply

parameters.name: Include Hidden Pages
parameters.description: A flag indicating whether to include hidden pages when exporting the entire report (when passing specific pages this property will be ignored). If not provided, the default behavior is to exclude hidden pages

parameters.name: Bookmark Name
parameters.description: The bookmark name

parameters.name: Bookmark State
parameters.description: The bookmark state

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: The filter to apply

parameters.name: pageName
parameters.description: The page name

parameters.name: visualName
parameters.description: (Optional) Visual name to be exported

parameters.name: Bookmark Name
parameters.description: The bookmark name

parameters.name: Bookmark State
parameters.description: The bookmark state

parameters.name: Username
parameters.description: The effective username reflected by a token for applying RLS rules (For OnPrem model, username can be composed of alpha-numerical characters or any of the following characters '.', '-', '_', '!', '#', '^', '~', '\', '@', also username cannot contain spaces. For Cloud model, username can be composed of all ASCII characters. username must be up to 256 characters)

parameters.name: Datasets
parameters.description: An array of datasets for which this identity applies

parameters.name: Roles
parameters.description: An array of RLS roles reflected by a token when applying RLS rules (identity can contain up to 50 roles, role can be composed of any character besides ',' and must be up to 50 characters)

parameters.name: CustomData
parameters.description: The value of customdata to be used for applying RLS rules. Only supported for live connections to Azure Analysis Services.

parameters.name: Blob Value
parameters.description: OAuth2 access token for SQL Azure

parameters.name: Reports
parameters.description: An array of reports for which this identity applies, Only supported for paginated reports

returns.raw:
The content of the file.
- File Content
- binary

| Name | Path | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| rows | body.rows | array of object |  |
| items | body.rows | object |  |
| User email | headers.x-ms-user-email-encoded | byte | The email address of the user who triggered the flow. |
| User name | headers.x-ms-user-name-encoded | byte | The display name of the user who triggered the flow. |
| Timestamp | headers.x-ms-user-timestamp | string | The time the flow was triggered. |
| User id | headers.x-ms-user-id | guid | The unique identifier of the user who triggered the flow in AAD. |
